debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
i j : Fin n
ω : WignerSpace n
⊢ (if h : i = j then @ω ⟨(i, i), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_2 n i⟩
    else
      if h : i < j then @ω ⟨(i, j), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_3 n i j ⋯⟩
      else @ω ⟨(j, i), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_5 n i j (wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_4 n i j ⋯ ⋯)⟩) =
    if h : j = i then @ω ⟨(j, j), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_2 n j⟩
    else
      if h : j < i then @ω ⟨(j, i), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_3 n j i ⋯⟩
      else @ω ⟨(i, j), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_5 n j i (wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_4 n j i ⋯ ⋯)⟩

failed_attempts:
rcases lt_trichotomy i j with h | rfl | h
  · simp [h, ne_of_lt h, not_lt_of_gt h]
  · rfl
  · simp [h, ne_of_lt h, not_lt_of_gt h]

unfold wignerMatrixEntryFunction
  rcases lt_trichotomy i j with h | rfl | h
  · simp [h, ne_of_lt, not_lt_of_gt]
  · simp
  · simp [h, ne_of_gt, not_lt_of_gt]
· simp [wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h, not_lt_of_lt h, ne_of_gt h]

unfold wignerMatrixEntryFunction
  rcases lt_trichotomy i j with h | rfl | h
  · rw [dif_neg (ne_of_lt h), dif_pos h, dif_neg (ne_of_lt h).symm, dif_neg (not_lt_of_gt h)]
    congr
  · rw [dif_pos rfl, dif_pos rfl]
  · rw [dif_neg (ne_of_lt h).symm, dif_neg (not_lt_of_gt h), dif_neg (ne_of_lt h), dif_pos h]
    congr

rcases lt_trichotomy i j with rfl | h | h
  · rfl
  · simp [h, not_lt_of_lt h, ne_of_lt h]
  · simp [h, not_lt_of_lt h, ne_of_gt h]
rcases lt_trichotomy i j with h | h | h <;> simp_all
